description.value: Aura faint conjuration and transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot feet; Price 5,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION These sturdy leather dwarven boots have soles made of thick gray marble. As a move action, the wearer can plant her feet and draw strength from the earth, gaining fast healing 1 and a +4 bonus to CMD to resist bull rush, reposition, and trip combat maneuver attempts. These effects end if the wearer moves or is moved, knocked prone, or rendered unconscious. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells bull’s strength, cure light wounds; Cost 2,500 gp.
